zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Elena Langley於1300年出生在英國奧可福爾希普頓-德-維華德時，她的父親John de Langley11297歲，母親Alice de Hills20歲。她於1319年與Giles Bassingbourne在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1369年在英國素瑞里士滿享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Elena Langley于1300年出生在英国奧可福爾希普頓-德-維華德时，她的父亲John de Langley11297岁，母亲Alice de Hills20岁。她于1319年与Giles Bassingbourne在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1369年在英国素瑞里士滿享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Langley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Langley or Longley (in Kent, Sussex, Hertfordshire, Norfolk, Somerset, Shrops, Lancashire, Durham, and many other counties), themselves from Old English lang ‘long’ + lēah ‘wood, glade, clearing’.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Langlif (Old Norse Langlíf ‘long’ + ‘life’ or ‘body’).

variants.name: Langlais
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Marcel, Normand, Albertine, Armand, Cecile, Enoil, Herve, Jacques, Laurent.
French: ethnic name for an Englishman, from Anglais ‘Englishman’, with fused definite article l'. Compare Langley .

History: Daniel Sargent dit Sérien and Langlais from Worcester, MA married Marguerite Lavoie in Rivière-Ouelle, QC, in 1718. Joseph Weber dit Langlais from Boston, MA married Marie-Charlotte Guillet in Cap Saint-Ignace, QC, in 1725.

variants.name: Longley
meanings: English (mainly Nottinghamshire and South Yorkshire): variant of   Langley  . Compare   Longpre   2.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Elena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , now used quite frequently in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Elena Langley was born in 1300, in Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England, her father, John de Langley, was 11297 and her mother, Alice de Hills, was 20. She married Giles Bassingbourne in 1319, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1369, in Richmond, Surrey, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Elena Langley est née en 1300, à Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Langley, avait 11297 ans et sa mère, Alice de Hills, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Giles Bassingbourne en 1319, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1369, à Richmond, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Elena Langley 1300 in Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Langley 11297 und ihre Mutter Alice de Hills 20. Sie hat 1319 in England, United Kingdom Giles Bassingbourne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1369 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Richmond, Surrey, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Elena Langley è nata il nel 1300 nel Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, John de Langley, aveva 11297 anni e sua madre, Alice de Hills, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Giles Bassingbourne nel 1319, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1369, nel Richmond, Surrey, England, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Elena Langleyが1300年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアシュイプトン-ウンデル-ウイチウッドで生まれた時，父John de Langleyは11297歳，母Alice de Hillsは20歳であった。1319年にイギリスイギリスでGiles Bassingbourneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1369年にイギリススリーリチモンドで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Elena Langley(이)가 1300년 영국 스퍼드실르 시프토-운더-w이ch우드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Langley(은)는 11297세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Hills(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1319년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Giles Bassingbourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1369년 영국 수리 리ch몽에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Elena Langley nasceu em 1300, em Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Langley, tinha 11297 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Hills, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Giles Bassingbourne em 1319, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1369, em Richmond, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Elena Langley родилась в 1300 г. в местности шиптон-ундир-вичвуд, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Langley было 11297 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Hills, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Giles Bassingbourne в 1319 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1369 г. в местности ричмонд, сурри, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Elena Langley nació en 1300, en Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Langley, tenía 11297 años y su mamá, Alice de Hills, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Giles Bassingbourne en 1319, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1369, en Richmond, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años.
